highlights: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center exploring queer art.
Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum.
Damien Hirst major survey at MMCA, Seoul.
Seo-Seoul Museum of Art opening with media art focus.
20! 2026 Art Seoul: digital art exhibit with 80% guarantee system.

stocks.market_sentiment: Bearish; defensive posturing as markets grapple with Iran war, oil price surge, and inflation concerns.
key_events: Global markets experiencing pullbacks; S&P 500 down 5% YTD.
Brent crude oil prices surged nearly 55% due to conflict; inflation worries rising.
Federal Reserve holds rates but warns of inflation outlook.
Investors moving to cash as a defensive allocation.
